chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 253 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on CMA No.861/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.862/2025 (C/A) 03-11-2025 Mr. Abdul Qadir Langah, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2/ Vide order dated 13-10-2025 certain directions were issued to the official respondents. The Petitioners/applicants have failed to produce any proof along with the listed contempt application showing that they have approached the official respondents. In the circumstances, no case for initiating contempt proceedings is made-out, consequently, the listed contempt application is dismissed. Judge ARBROHI/PS
